hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-zinc-950
hierarchy.code: text-xl md:text-2xl font-mono tracking-[0.25em] text-zinc-950 bg-zinc-100 py-3 px-4 rounded-md text-center w-full break-all

layout.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8
layout.bento_rules: Use align-items: start on grid. Add align-self: stretch to items to ensure equal height cards.

cards.base: relative flex flex-col bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-xl p-6 lg:p-8 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 overflow-hidden group

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-md bg-zinc-950 text-white font-medium hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-400 focus:outline-none w-full
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-md bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-400 focus:outline-none w-full
buttons.icon: h-10 w-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors

motion.framer_motion: Use AnimatePresence for code regenerations (fade and slight slide up when code changes).

images.description: Minimalist abstract 3D geometric shapes background. Use with absolute positioning, -z-10, opacity-20 or opacity-30, and object-cover to give the hero section a premium corporate feel without distracting from text.

icons.brands: react-icons/si (SiAmazon, SiNetflix, SiSpotify, SiSteam, SiApple, SiGoogleplay). CRITICAL: Import correctly from react-icons/si.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. Every interactive element must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Examples: data-testid='brand-card-amazon', data-testid='regenerate-button-amazon', data-testid='copy-button-amazon', data-testid='code-display-amazon'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text passes WCAG AA. Zinc-950 on white is high contrast. Buttons have clear focus states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add react-icons sonner framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
Add Google Fonts 'Outfit', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' to index.html or global CSS.
Implement a clean, high-contrast, Swiss-style UI (Archetype 4 Light Theme). No dark mode needed.
Hero Section: Massive typography using Outfit font. Background should use the provided hero_background image with opacity-30 so text remains legible.

Card Layout: Use grid layout for brand cards. Each card must have its brand icon (from react-icons/si), the brand name, a grey box displaying the generated code in JetBrains Mono font, and two buttons side-by-side: Regenerate and Copy.

Code Generation Logic: Mock the code generator function per brand to return a plausible format (e.g., Amazon: XXXX-XXXXXX-XXXX, Steam: XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX, Apple: XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX). The function should randomly pick characters from A-Z and 0-9.
Interactions: When 'Regenerate' is clicked, the code updates immediately. When 'Copy' is clicked, copy to clipboard and show a success toast using Sonner.
Add hover effects on cards: slight negative translate-y, increased shadow, and change border color to the specific brand color (e.g., green for Spotify).
Ensure ALL buttons, cards, and text displays have distinct data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use HTML native components for interactions if Shadcn or equivalent is available. Use Shadcn Button.
